bio.bioPara: 3rd-year CS student and full-stack developer expanding into AI/ML. I care about clean backend architecture and ruthlessly optimized code. Outside the terminal, my downtime goes entirely into fencing, 3D product renders, and JDM car culture.

projects.name: GlowAroma
projects.desc: Full-stack e-commerce candle shop. Custom configurator, role-based admin.

projects.name: Synq
projects.desc: A mobile-first productivity web app for students, combining relational task management with an aesthetic Pomodoro focus timer. Users organize study material by subject and topic, run timed focus sessions, and track completed work in an archive system — all synced to the cloud across devices.

projects.name: Vanity
projects.desc: A sleek, frameless desktop mirror for Linux Wayland. Vanity is a lightweight QML/Qt6 widget that drops a clean, borderless camera feed at the top of your screen — a quick digital pocket mirror for checking yourself before a video call or screen recording. Built natively for Wayland compositors like Hyprland, it features a true horizontally-flipped mirror feed, a smooth 800ms drop-down animation tuned to camera warmup time, and a one-click install script for seamless launcher integration.
